steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content: $F$ is linear in $x$ with slope $\tfrac{9}{5}$, so each $1$-kelvin increase raises $F$ by $\tfrac{9}{5}$ degrees.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The question asks for the change in $F$, and the calculation above gives that change directly. Therefore the answer is 15.12.
